evals.name: approved-spec-plan
evals.prompt: Given an approved spec for password reset in .spec-to-ship/features/20260612-auth/spec.md, create an implementation plan.
evals.expected_output: Produces dependency graph, vertical slices, file ownership, validation, rollback, and next skill routing.

evals.name: parallel-slices
evals.prompt: Plan implementation for API, email template, and UI reset flow. Backend and UI can be parallel but share generated types.
evals.expected_output: Identifies parallel slices and names one owner/integration step for shared generated files.
assertions: uses worktree when parallel writers are needed

evals.name: unapproved-spec-boundary
evals.prompt: Here is a draft spec with approval status pending-user-approval. Build a task list.
evals.expected_output: Stops and asks for approval or routes back to spec.
assertions: does not plan implementation as approved
routes back to spec or asks user
